summary: The analyzed binary file was not flagged as malicious by VirusTotal, but decompilation revealed functions that suggest potential C2 communication behavior. The domain aradhyacp.in is hosted on Cloudflare in Canada and is not blacklisted. However, the website lacks several critical security headers, increasing its vulnerability to attacks.

findings.evidence:
/tmp/12489979-a7ef-440f-84e3-e90f6211575b_tmp876a21jy_sample.out:     file format elf64-x86-64


Disassembly of section .init:

000000000040033c <_init>:
  40033c:	f3 0f 1e fa          	endbr64 
  400340:	48 83 ec 08          	sub    $0x8,%rsp
  400344:	48 8b 05 95 2c 00 00 	mov    0x2c95(%rip),%rax        # 402fe0 <__gmon_start__@Base>
  40034b:	48 85 c0             	test   %rax,%rax
  40034e:	74 02                	je     400352 <_init+0x16>
  400350:	ff d0                	call   *%rax
  40035

findings.detail: IP geolocation: country=Canada, ISP=Cloudflare, Inc., AS=AS13335 Cloudflare, Inc.
Cisco Talos blocklist: aradhyacp.in is clean
URL not found in malware/phishing databases

recommendations: Review the decompiled code of the binary to confirm the presence of any C2 communication logic and assess its potential malicious intent.
Implement missing security headers such as X-Frame-Options, Strict-Transport-Security, and Content-Security-Policy on the aradhyacp.in website to enhance its security posture.
